items.briefing:
Telstra has introduced bank-verified identity checks in its retail stores, adding a stronger layer of protection against SIM-swap fraud and identity theft — a positive development for Australian consumers. Separately, a new exploit called RoguePlanet targeting Microsoft systems has been released by a known threat group, meaning organisations should ensure Windows systems are fully patched and up to date as soon as possible.

A vulnerability has also been flagged in ServiceNow, a platform widely used by Australian businesses for IT management. If your organisation uses ServiceNow, check with your IT team or vendor to confirm the latest security updates have been applied.

**Tip:** Remind staff to report any unexpected account lockouts or password reset requests immediately — these can be early signs of an attempted breach.

featured.title: Global cyber attacks fall but ransomware jumps 48%
featured.quote: Ransomware attacks jumped 48% year-on-year, posing escalating threat to Australian businesses and organizations.
